creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
> OK, I can do those 4 files.  But ...

> > mv $CVSROOT/ports/german/webalizer2 $CVSROOT/ports/german/webalizer
> 
> I don't think it's possible to do that.  As far as I know, we can only
> perform repository copies in cases where the destination file does not
> already exist.  If we copied onto an existing file in the repository,
> it would wipe out all of the history in the original file.

Most of the history of the ports has been wiped out already,
when the Attic has been removed last winter.
I don't have problems with teh Name "webalizer2", so we can keep it.

> Do you still want me to copy "ports/www/webalizer-2/files/patch-a[a-d]",
> even though the "ports/german/..." files cannot be copied?

yes ... go ahead ...

kind regards Dirk

- Dirk Meyer, Im Grund 4, 34317 Habichtswald, Germany
